mapper.sql: SELECT A.CONTRACT_NUM , A.SUB_LINK_NAME AS CUST_NM , A.SUBSCRIBER_NO AS SVC_TEL_NO , A.USER_SSN AS SSN , NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP') AS SERVICE_TYPE , DECODE(NVL(A.PPPO, 'PP'), 'PP', '선불', '후불') AS SERVICE_TYPE_NM , A.LST_COM_ACTV_DATE AS OPEN_DT , A.SUB_STATUS AS SUB_STATUS , CMN.CD_DSC AS SUB_STATUS_NM , B.REQ_BUY_TYPE AS BUY_TYPE , DECODE(B.REQ_BUY_TYPE, 'MM', '단말구매', 'UU', '유심단독', '유심단독') AS BUY_TYPE_NM , NVL(TO_CHAR(C.ENGG_MNTH_CNT), '0') AS ENGG_MNTH_CNT , NVL(C.MODEL_MONTHLY, '0') AS MODEL_MONTHLY , FN_GET_USRNM(AGRM.CNSL_ID) AS CNSL_NM , TO_CHAR(AGRM.TRNS_AGRM_DTTM, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS TRNS_AGRM_DTTM , DECODE(AGRM.TRNS_AGRM_YN, 'Y', '동의', 'N', '미동의', '') AS TRNS_AGRM_NM , NVL(AGRM.TRNS_AGRM_YN, 'Y') AS TRNS_AGRM_YN , AGRM.PROC_MTHD_CD AS PROC_MTHD_CD , DECODE(AGRM.PROC_MTHD_CD, '10', '해지', '20', '(타사)번호이동', '') AS PROC_MTHD_NM , AGRM.TRNS_MEMO AS TRNS_MEMO FROM MSP_JUO_SUB_INFO A , MSP_REQUEST B , MSP_REQUEST_SALEINFO C , MSP_SO_TRNS_AGRM_MST AGRM , CMN_GRP_CD_MST CMN WHERE A.SUB_STATUS NOT IN ( 'C' ) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = B.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND B.REQUEST_KEY = C.REQUEST_KEY(+) AND A.CONTRACT_NUM = AGRM.CONTRACT_NUM(+) AND A.SUB_STATUS = CMN.CD_VAL AND CMN.GRP_ID = 'MSP0003'

select.if: AND ( A.SUBSCRIBER_NO LIKE '%' || #{searchVal} || '%' OR UPPER(A.SUB_LINK_NAME) LIKE '%' || UPPER(#{searchVal}) || '%' )
